title: add !remote tag to packages that should not be included in the remote client + vendor c/common

comments.body: That's getting quite hairy.  Are you sure to pull it through?  I am also OK to revert the change in libimage and continue relying on the bloat checks.  Both options are OK for me.
I think it should work now, I don't really want to revert as it seems the bloat check especially for remote is getting ignored otherwise.
